task_description: Create 6 new pages (royalties, voting, tops, outerwear, accessories, arrivals), implement Vote Up functionality, update all navigation links, and include Hoodie/Polo Shirt/T-shirt products with size inventory.

verification.summary: All 6 new HTML pages created with correct content. Vote Up functionality added to main.js. All links updated across all pages. No build/test framework to run (static site). Verified via grep and file existence checks.
